calendar.matters:
Compromise Of Person With A Disability In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of an Adult Person with a disability hearing this day. Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Atty. Cecilia Han, Esq. for Petitione Alys Durenberger was present. An order granting waiver of appearance of petitioner was filed on August 7, 2006.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Settlement amount - $20,017.85
Atty. fees- $ 5,344.34
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by petitioner or atty. -$895.56
Total allowance for fees and expenses from settlement of judgment - $6,239.90
A net balance for of $13,777.95 shall be made to the trustee of the John Norman Durenberger Special Needs Trust under Probate Code Section 3604 for the benefit of John Durenberger.
Future settlements - Petitioner is authorized to accept future settlements from other defendants in this action and shall be deposited into a special needs trusts designated for the care of John Durenberger. Petitioner is authorized to Deposit settlement monies to the special needs trust without the necessity of further petition being made to this court.

Orders Approving Compromise of Claim was signed in open court.
